title: polypodium somayae
intro: Polypodium somayae, also known as the Persian polypody, is a type of fern native to Iran. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Polypodium somayae is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and protecting against oxidative stress. It can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried extract, which are commonly used in herbal preparations.
